name: Academic Success Centre Workshops
blurb: Academic skills, study strategies, writing, and exam-prep workshops. Most run on CampusBridge and need registration.

name: Career Centre Events & Employer Sessions
blurb: Resume and interview prep, employer info sessions, networking, and career fairs posted on campusBRIDGE.

name: UAlberta Events Calendar
blurb: The university-wide events listing across faculties, departments, and campus units.
